description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit with a rectangular base and a slightly protruding upper section, topped with a rounded arch. The front features three open shelves, each with a lip to prevent items from falling, and a deep base compartment. The sides are solid and flat, providing structural support and a clean silhouette. The back is also solid, with no visible openings or features. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use in public urban spaces such as bus stops, parks, or sidewalks for displaying or storing items. The surface appears to be made of a hard, matte material, likely painted or coated wood or metal.
description: A tall, freestanding shelving unit with three open shelves and a deep base compartment, topped with a rounded arch and solid sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, a deep base compartment, and the rounded arch at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid, flat side panels and the depth of the upper and lower sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with solid, flat panels.
